title: Integrating Email IDs into Monday.com for Enhanced Communication
excerpt:
Dear Monday.com Team, 
I’m reaching out with a critical request that could substantially improve our workflow within Monday.com. Currently, we’re facing a challenge where incoming emails with valuable project information…

posts.author: laura2594 (Laura)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Monday.com Team,

I’m reaching out with a critical request that could substantially improve our workflow within Monday.com. Currently, we’re facing a challenge where incoming emails with valuable project information and requests remain trapped in individual mailboxes, disconnected from our collaborative efforts on Monday.com.

The solution is straightforward yet pivotal: we need the ability to integrate item IDs directly into the subject lines of emails. Moreover, these emails must find their way into the Emails & Activities section in Monday.com, ensuring seamless visibility and collaboration.

By incorporating item IDs into email subjects, we can effortlessly link incoming communication with specific tasks or projects. This small but crucial detail will greatly enhance context, efficiency, and our overall project management experience. Additionally, the inclusion of these emails within Monday.com would establish a clear and organized history of interactions, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

I urge you to consider the significance of this feature and its potential to transform the way we use Monday.com for communication. Addressing this gap would not only save us time spent searching for relevant emails but also solidify Monday.com as the hub for all our collaborative efforts.

Thank you for your swift attention to this matter. I eagerly await your response and hope to see this enhancement integrated into Monday.com’s functionality.

Best regards,
Laura

posts.author: Equinox (Hugues)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a big issue for us. This greatly penalizes the efficiency of Monday. It significantly limits the fluidity of exchanges with customers when creating tickets.

posts.author: ghenderson18 (greg.henderson@verusglobalsolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Laura! We are having the exact same challenge as well…I’m curious if you guys ever found a solution to this? Please help to advise, if you don’t mind…thank you!
Greg
